title: 8. **meOS B2B Sales**
summary:
What it is: A service that sells meOS iOS app solutions to businesses, offering customized implementations and support.
Revenue model: The service will charge a one-time implementation fee, with potential for ongoing subscription-based revenue.
Time to first dollar: 2-3 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by researching potential clients and creating a sales pitch for the B2B service.
Risk/blocker: The biggest obstacle will be competing with existing mobile app solutions and establishing tru
